rationale: Tests if extreme compression of multiple short-term moving averages in QQQ precedes tradable volatility expansions in TECL.
expected_failure_mode: Compression often resolves with false breakouts before reversing into the true trend direction.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Expected value after compression is negative over a 10-year test.
